summary: Full backend + frontend testing of the new ASN Creation Automation module in TEST/simulation mode. All 8 pytest cases (import idempotency, edit+PO sync, PDI PDF gating, happy-path run with full log/screenshot capture and MD sync, failure path with NOPO + retry-after-fix, run concurrency 409, xlsx export, status filter/search, MD OCR field regression) pass. Frontend ASN module page loads with stats+table, import button, edit dialog (PO/transporter/save), PDI attach button, run/log buttons wired; log dialog shows all 8 required automation events; ASN numbers displayed on Completed rows. Regression pages (Master Dispatch, E-Way Bill Entry, Vendor E-Way Bill Ack) load without errors and vendor-ack shows newly created ASN numbers linked back to Master Dispatch records - confirming MD sync end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: run_state is a process-global dict - if backend has multiple workers (uvicorn --workers>1) the 409 guard leaks; currently OK since single worker but worth noting.
AsnEditInput has no bounds/validation on basic_amount/total_amount (e.g., negatives allowed). Consider Field(ge=0).
process_queue swallows non-AutomationError exceptions per record but re-raises AutomationError from bot.start/login aborting the whole batch - acceptable but worth documenting.
asn_routes.serialize converts _id but downstream serialization of nested docs already uses default JSON (OK, no ObjectId leak observed).
seed_data_creation: Tests seed fresh master_dispatch records via POST /api/master-dispatch with invoice numbers TEST/9101-*, TEST/9200-*, TEST/9300-*, TEST/9400-* (timestamped). Left in DB for main agent inspection; safely identifiable by TEST/ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AUTOMATION_MODE is 'test'. ASN records created by pytest are all Completed/Failed with TEST/ prefix invoice_no. The vendor-ack page confirms MD sync (ASN26798526, ASN26391661, ASN26733993 linked). Real 26-27/1032 record has po 5540005952 / asn ASN2026071401 preserved. To re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_asn.py -v.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found. All acceptance criteria met: import idempotent (unique index on master_dispatch_id), PO edit syncs to MD, non-PDF PDI rejected 400, PDI gates Draft->Ready, happy-path produces Completed status with ASN number, full 8-event automation_log, before_submit + after_success screenshots, MD updated with asn_number and status ready_for_eway. Failure path (NOPO) produces Failed status with 'not found in dropdown' error and after_failure screenshot; fix+re-run via /asn/run completes successfully. Concurrency lock returns 409/400. Export returns valid xlsx. MD OCR fields (po_number, asn_number, plant) intact on existing records.
